_meta.description: Golden fixtures for the single-instrument proxy SVAR (external-instrument SVAR-IV; Stock-Watson 2018, Mertens-Ravn 2013, Gertler-Karadi 2015, Montiel-Olea-Stock-Watson 2021).

references.reduced_form: statsmodels VAR(y).fit(lags, trend="c"): resid, df-adjusted sigma_u, ma_rep(horizon) (Psi_0 = I)
references.identification: numpy method of moments: gamma = mean_O (m-mbar)(u-ubar); rho = gamma/gamma[nv]; b = unit*rho; irf_h = Psi_h @ b
references.first_stage: OLS u_nv ~ [1, m] over O; HC1-robust F = beta^2/Var_HC1(beta), classical F = beta^2 Smm/(SSE/(|O|-2)); reliability = corrcoef(m, u_nv)^2
